# Layer 2 Manifest — populated knowledge content
# ================================================================
# Layer 2 = Layer 1 (all base content)
#         + the knowledge folders listed below, once populated
#
# These folders hold the "brain" — the knowledge the buyer ingests
# and the agents derived from it.
#
# RULE: Layer 2 excludes Layer 3 private/runtime data.
# UPDATED: 2026-06-30
# ================================================================

# === ADDITIONS (on top of Layer 1) ===

# Knowledge base — external bucket (ingested expert content)
knowledge/external/dna/
knowledge/external/dossiers/
knowledge/external/playbooks/
knowledge/external/sources/

# === LAYER 3 EXCLUSIONS (never in Layer 2) ===
# These are stripped from Layer 2:
#   - knowledge/external/inbox/  (raw uploads)
#   - logs/                      (session logs)
#   - .env*                      (API keys)
#   - .mcp.json                  (MCP secrets)
#   - .data/                     (RAG indexes)
#   - .claude/sessions/          (runtime state)
#   - processing/                (pipeline artifacts)
